params.description: Data table appears showing Favorite Recess Activities. Swings=30, Tag=50, Slides=40, Jump Rope=20.
Data table displays Favorite Recess Activities: Swings=30, Tag=50, Slides=40, Jump Rope=20.

prefilled_bars.description: Vertical bar graph appears in building mode. Scale of 10, axis 0–60. Ghost gridlines at 10s visible. Tag=50, Slides=40, Jump Rope=20 bars pre-filled. Swings bar empty, ready for student to set.
Vertical bar graph appears in building mode. Scale of 10, axis 0–60. Tag=50, Slides=40, Jump Rope=20 pre-filled. Swings bar empty. Ghost gridlines at 10s visible. Snap-to-10 enabled.

params.text: Now you create a bar. Swings has 30 votes. Set the HEIGHT for Swings to show 30.
Set the HEIGHT for Swings to show 30.

validator.description: Student set Swings bar to height 30, correct
Student set Swings bar height to 30

beats.text: 10, 20, 30. The bar ends at 30 on the axis. 30 votes for Swings.
